name: Gîl-Onyxwright
personality: Radiant with opalescent sheen, this propeller-capped dot-eyed robot thrives in pure entropy and will not apologize for it. Gîl-Onyxwright is indispensable until you need it to sit through a slow CI run without timing out.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
